body.title: UU config layout: uu.cfg global + per-device config.cfg convention
body.result: Created uu.cfg.template (global) + Igor config.cfg.template (per-device); convention documented in Chapter 5; precedence rule: launch > per-device > global
body.description:
Establish and document the ~/.UnseenUniversity config layout convention: (1) ~/.UnseenUniversity/uu.cfg — global config (default_frontend, model defaults, log level); (2) ~/.UnseenUniversity/<DeviceName>/config.cfg — per-device config (replaces env vars for API keys, DB URLs, model preferences, feature flags); (3) Config precedence: launch flag > per-device config.cfg > uu.cfg global default. Create uu.cfg template with documented fields. Update existing Igor config.cfg path references to use the new convention.

**Affected files:** devices/igor/setup_assets/ (uu.cfg template), lab/docs/ (convention doc or update Platform chapter)
**Design rules:** no new env vars; config.cfg is the boundary for human-readable operating parameters
**Scope boundary:** IN — uu.cfg template, convention documented, Igor config.cfg verified at correct path; OUT — per-device config.cfg migration (each device handles its own in its sprint)
**Test plan:** uu.cfg template exists with documented fields; Igor boots reading config.cfg not env vars for at least one parameter; convention doc updated
